calendar.matters:
Petition To Combine Similar Trusts For The Benefit Of Scott William Murray And Barry P. Murray Kuhn
Off Calendar May-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Korbholz and Evan Abrams for Trustee.

The Court granted the petition to combine the Trusts (similar Trusts) but did not authorize execution of a new trust. Mr. Korbholz is to prepare a new order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5520. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Bloom.
